old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.1.1","title":"Gate root DAO origins by explicit admission","description":"Add bounded explicit admission of currently pinned Announce identities before a new DAO origin can consume durable high-water capacity. Existing persisted high-water origins remain admitted on open; no silent eviction or destructive retirement API.","acceptance_criteria":"256 unadmitted churn identities consume no durable slots; admitted pinned identity applies; persisted high-water admission survives reopen; typed rejection/error exists; capacity fails closed.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-20T06:06:49.526638421Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-20T06:06:49.526638421Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.1.1","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-20T06:06:49.611532036Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Added bounded root-only explicit admission of currently pinned Announce keys, typed admission errors/outcome, persisted high-water restoration, and no retirement API. Added unadmitted non-mutation, admitted apply/reopen, 256 churn, and capacity no-eviction tests.
